attributes.description: Alerts when `node_up < 1`. Node down triggers automatic shard failover.
attributes.name: [Redis Enterprise OTel] Node down

investigation_guide.blob:
## Redis Enterprise node down

### What fired
`node_up < 1` during the window.

### Why it matters
A down node reduces cluster capacity and triggers failover for its shards. Extended downtime risks availability and durability.

### Triage
1. Check host health and management service.

### Remediation
- Recover or replace the node.

### Tuning
- Always P1.
